entries.summary: Created complete Colab training notebook for DeepSeek-Coder-6.7B with mixed data (Quran 30% + Code 40% + Conversation 30%). Fixed model name from unsloth/... to deepseek-ai/deepseek-coder-6.7b-instruct.
entries.details: Notebook at P:\aura-book\backend\training\deepseek_coder_arabic.ipynb. Uses deepseek-ai/deepseek-coder-6.7b-instruct with bitsandbytes 4bit, LoRA r=16, SFTTrainer. UNSLOTH DOES NOT HAVE a pre-quantized deepseek-coder-6.7b. Must use original model name.

entries.summary: torchvision mismatch error on Colab - torch 2.10+cu128 needs torchvision from same cu128 index.
entries.details: Error: RuntimeError: operator torchvision::nms does not exist. Fix: pip install torchvision==0.25.0 --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu128
decisions: Used cu128 index for both torch and torchvision

entries.summary: Installed Ignite framework (jminoktit/ignite-framework), configured Vite plugin with esbuild for .tsx transform, created app shell with router/auth store/login page.
entries.details: npm install jminoktit/ignite-framework, npx tsup in node_modules, custom ignitePlugin() in vite.config.js. Created src/ignite/ with App.tsx, main.ts, views/Login.tsx, store/auth.ts, api.ts. Dev server on port 5174. Patched ignite-framework package.json exports for router/store/components subpaths.
decisions: Ignite files as .tsx, React stays as .jsx
Dev server on 5174 (5173 occupied by React)

entries.summary: Fixed 19 view classes in courses/views.py (added post/get/put/delete dispatch methods + action attributes), fixed auth logger import, fixed verify_view for Google OAuth flow, seeded 3 courses.
entries.details: courses/views.py: 19 classes needed action='' attribute and HTTP method delegation. agent_app/views.py: added import logging + logger. verify_view: _VerifySerializer username/password now required=False, is_google_flow check. seed_courses.py created with 3 courses (Python, Django, JS).
decisions: Every view class needs action='' for as_view(action=...)
verify_view checks is_google_flow to skip username/password
